title: whiteodendron moultonianum
intro: Whiteodendron moultonianum, also known as the yellow gentian, is a flowering plant native to China, classified under the family Gentianaceae. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Whiteodendron moultonianum include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as acting as an antiviral and antioxidant agent. Whiteodendron moultonianum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, with the roots and rhizomes being used to create medicinal preparations.
